risks: Builder-designer disagreement escalation could stall execution — CEO becomes bottleneck
Design phase adds latency to every UI task — need a threshold for when to trigger vs skip
Design artifact format ambiguity — builder may ignore design like brainstorm output
over_engineering_flags: Scope is tight — reuse existing Quinn design format, no new infrastructure

projects.title: Add design-first flow for UI tasks in execution pipeline
projects.scope_summary: Modify 09-execute-projects.md to add a 'visual-design' phase that spawns Quinn before the build phase for UI tasks. Define the detection heuristic (browser_test: true, category game/dashboard, or agent includes frontend/full-stack touching UI files). Define the design artifact handoff (Quinn produces visual-design.md). Add builder acceptance gate: builder reviews design and either accepts or objects (escalate to CEO). Update builder prompt to reference the visual-design artifact. Update phase-definitions.md and casting-rules.md.
